name: coODDownloadResponse
title: coODDownloadResponse
description: The function confirms a SDO download transfer, which was initiated on an object with access type 7. It can be used, e.g. in the event function coOnDownloadIndication. If the transfer should be aborted, then coODAbortTransfer must be used.

parameters.name: errCode
parameters.description: Error code buffer (is entered in index 0 of the field)
